How many named plaintiffs and legal team members did Schaub have on his show?
How many members of the @MMAFA has he had on?
These guys act like there was nothing they could have done. https://t.co/vAqfxvuMbx

RT @lthomasnews: What is the argument for moving UP in the rankings after losing by KO?
Note: whatever argument you make in favor of this…
RT @Holden_Culotta: Ron Paul warns that the US military was just “authorized to kill Americans on US soil … I think it’s very, very dangero…

No more referee intervention
I don’t care if these phony fans don’t like it. It’s proof to me that they aren’t actually fans. If you have to promote to the lowest common denominator to make a buck then your product is going to be sh*t. I loved Gracie vs Sakuraba. It was a 90 min… https://t.co/XI76DdmoKe https://t.co/4y68ocRDpb

Should have bee…
When you realize these promotions don’t make their money from viewership, then things will start to make sense. https://t.co/VhqMqFLyBO

Seminar this Sunday Oct 20th
I’m back with another seminar announcement. This Sunday, Oct 20th I’ll be in Oceanside, CA at @10thplanetoceanside doing an epic 3 hr seminar. Come through and learn some dark arts from the SMASH system. https://t.co/AZ69cdUMAa

Fitch SMASH programs: https://t.co/OT7H3OvTel

Sign up for the newsletter below: 🏆https://t.co/7SdpoHTk9R🏆

Company fighters that got special treatment from the company sticking up for the company.
I’m so surprised. https://t.co/ns5g60lEfe

Mundell is built for bare knuckles
Mundell is the champ and I’m not surprised. He has been in a groove for a while and looking like he was meant for bare knuckles. Christie is no chump so the win is even more impressive. Who do you see that might give Mundell a run for his… https://t.co/hKW73TTVpv https://t.co/xJ3BuCkpVQ

RT @heynottheface: When people say going to trial would be a slam dunk, I suggest they look at the comments. While the majority voice suppo…
RT @shaunonsite: I filmed one of Jon's seminars. If you're in the area and want some wisdom, PLEASE go! This man is a genius!

The outside step High C
The high crotch takedown can be a bit sticky if you aren’t very good at it. If you put in the work and get good with it then the outside step entry can level it up even more. https://t.co/fWEXSwoJYS
